hero.title: Edit, Sign & Convert PDFs
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one PDF platform for individuals and teams. Edit, annotate, sign and convert PDFs without installing any software.
hero.dropLabel: Drop your PDF here to get started
hero.dropDesc: or click to browse · No account needed

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Process your PDFs in three simple steps. No account, no software, no waiting.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag and drop or select your PDF (or other file) from your device. Files are encrypted on upload.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Use our powerful online tools to edit, annotate, convert, compress, or reorganize your document — right in your browser.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Your processed file is ready in seconds. Download it or share a link. Files are automatically deleted after 2 hours for privacy.

cta.title: Edit and download your PDF now
cta.subtitle: Start your 7-day trial for just 0,50 €. Full access to all tools. Cancel before the trial ends and pay nothing more.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about PDFCraft.
faqs.a1: PDFCraft is a subscription service. You can open the editor and preview your document for free, but downloading requires an active subscription. Start for just 0,50 € for a 7-day full access trial, then 49,90 €/month.
faqs.a2: Pay 0,50 € today and get full access to all tools for 7 days. After the trial, your subscription automatically renews at 49,90 €/month until cancelled. Cancel any time before the trial ends to pay nothing more.
faqs.a3: Log into your account → Dashboard → Billing → Cancel Subscription. One click, instant. No calls, no forms. You keep access until the end of the current billing period.
faqs.a4: Yes. All uploads are encrypted with SSL. We never read or share your files. All uploaded files are permanently and automatically deleted from our servers after 2 hours.
faqs.q5: Do I need to install software?
faqs.a5: No. PDFCraft works 100% in your browser — on any device, any OS. No downloads, no plugins required.
faqs.a6: PDF, Word (.doc, .docx), Excel (.xls, .xlsx), PowerPoint (.ppt, .pptx), JPG, PNG, GIF and WEBP depending on the tool.

pricingPage.title: Start your PDFCraft subscription
pricingPage.disclosure: By activating your 7 day trial for 0,50 €, you are starting a recurring monthly subscription. Once the trial period ends, you will be automatically charged the standard 49,90 € fee each month.
pricingPage.disclosure2: You can cancel at any time from your dashboard. To avoid being charged 49,90 €, you must cancel at least 1 hour before the trial period ends.
pricingPage.faq1Q: What exactly happens at the end of my 7 day trial period?
pricingPage.faq1A: The trial period costs 0,50 € and lasts for 7 calendar days. IMPORTANT: If you do not cancel your subscription before the end of this period, your account will automatically renew to the standard monthly plan. After 7 days, you will be automatically charged the fee of 49,90 € each month until you decide to cancel in your account settings.
pricingPage.faq2Q: What are the real limitations of the 7-day trial?
pricingPage.faq2A: During the 7-day trial you can process up to 3 documents per day. Storage is temporary (24 hours). Collaborator features are not available. After upgrading to a monthly subscription, all limits are removed.
pricingPage.faq3Q: When should I cancel to avoid being charged the monthly subscription fee?
pricingPage.faq3A: You must cancel at least 1 hour before the trial period ends to avoid being charged the monthly subscription fee of 49,90 €. You can cancel easily from your account dashboard under Billing settings.
pricingPage.faq4Q: Can I request a refund if I have missed the cancellation deadline?
pricingPage.faq4A: The 0,50 € trial fee is non-refundable. For monthly charges, you may contact support within 3 days of the charge if no documents were downloaded. We review refund requests case by case. Contact: support@pdfcraft.online

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start your trial today for just 0,50 €. Full access, no hidden fees.
